creator: Studded@dal.net
text:
The recent problems in the vm system seem to have been completely
hammered out, so you might want to give this another try. Make sure that
you are reading freebsd-current, have a good backup of all essential
info and give the latest snapshot/cvsup of -Current a try. Please
respond to the freebsd-gnats-submit address with your results.

Good luck,

Doug
